description_long: This is a small, handcrafted wooden sailboat with a single upright mast and a triangular white sail. The hull is painted in a gradient of blue and green along the upper edge, with the lower portion left as natural wood, giving it a rustic appearance. The boat features an open cockpit with a hollowed interior, and a flat transom at the stern. The rudder is a simple rectangular wooden piece attached at the back. The mast is centrally positioned and painted white, supporting the sail which is slightly curved as if catching a gentle breeze. The overall design is simple and stylized, reminiscent of a decorative or toy sailboat rather than a full-sized, functional vessel.
description: A small, stylized wooden sailboat with a blue-green painted hull, white mast, and triangular sail. The open cockpit and simple rudder give it a handcrafted, decorative look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full triangular sail, blue-green hull, and natural wood base.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the open cockpit, central mast, and the rectangular rudder at the stern.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the sail angled away, showing the open interior and flat transom.
description_view_3: Angled rear view displaying the mast, sail curvature, and the hollowed cockpit.
